name: RadNet, Inc.
business: RadNet is a leading national provider of diagnostic imaging services in the United States, operating 418 imaging centers as of December 31, 2025. The company offers multi-modality imaging services including MRI, CT, PET, nuclear medicine, mammography, ultrasound, X-ray, and fluoroscopy. Additionally, its Digital Health segment sells AI-powered health informatics solutions, including RIS/PACS systems, to over 2,000 customers in the U.S. and internationally.
sellsTo: Third-party payors (managed care organizations, insurance companies, Medicare, Medicaid)

exposures.sentence: Our services include magnetic resonance imaging ("MRI"), computed tomography ("CT"), positron emission tomography ("PET"), nuclear medicine, mammography, ultrasound, diagnostic radiology ("X-ray"), fluoroscopy and other related procedures.
Integral to the imaging center business is our Digital Health operating segment, which sells computerized systems that distribute, display, store and retrieve digital images.

catalysts.sentence: On June 2, 2025, through our wholly owned subsidiary DH AI International Holdings, B.V, we acquired all of the equity interest in See-Mode Technologies
On July 17, 2025, we completed the acquisition of all of the outstanding equity interests of iCAD, Inc.
On November 10, 2025, the Company completed the acquisition of all outstanding shares of CIMAR (UK) Limited

catalysts.event: Formation of Pacific Diagnostic Imaging Group
catalysts.sentence: On March 21, 2025, we formed Pacific Diagnostic Imaging Group, LLC
On April 1, 2025, we entered into a partnership with Tri-City Healthcare District
On June 12, 2025, we executed a $17.0 million promissory note with Dignity Health
